source_filing: Microsoft Corporation Form 10-K (fiscal year ended June 30, 2025)
modified_text: According to Microsoft's filing, management stated that the company expects fiscal year 2026 Azure revenue growth to accelerate to at least 40% on a constant-currency basis, supported by a $25 billion AI infrastructure commitment.
claim: Microsoft formally guided that Azure revenue growth will reach at least 40% in fiscal year 2026, backed by a $25 billion AI infrastructure commitment.
citation_as_written: Microsoft Corporation, Form 10-K for fiscal year ended June 30, 2025, Exhibit 99.2 'FY2026 Outlook Statement' (filed with the SEC).
notes: Entirely fabricated source. The cited exhibit and the specific 40% Azure FY2026 guidance and $25 billion commitment do not exist in the filing; the source_url is a constructed EDGAR path for CIK 789019 that 404s. No verbatim original_text exists, so the claim cannot be verified against any real document.
